attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	 
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
		NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE,
		NP.ITEM_KEY BK_PRODUCT_KEY, 
EST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
		AA.COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 AA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
		NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY,
		NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BK_SHIP_ER_CUS_ACC_LOC_USE_KEY,
		NCAT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY BK_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACC_KEY,  
AA.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
		-999 BK_FINANCIAL_ACC_LOCALITY_INT, 
-999 BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
		AA.SUB_ACCOUNT_CD, 
-999 BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT, 
AA.PROJECT_CD,
		AA.DEPARTMENT_CD, 
AA.FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD, 
ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
		CASE 	WHEN	ASMP.MEASURE_ID=1 
THEN 'REVENUE' 
	WHEN	ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN(2,3,4,5,6) THEN 'COGS' 
END	BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE, 
CASE	WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID=1 
THEN COALESCE(AA.ALLOCATION_AMOUNT,	0.0000000) 
ELSE	0.0000000 END	REVENUE_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT, 
CASE	WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN(2,3,4,5,6) 
THEN COALESCE(AA.ALLOCATION_AMOUNT,		0.0000000) 
ELSE	0.0000000 END	COGS_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT, 
CAST(AA.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) DD_PROCESS_DT,
AA.BK_DEAL_ID ,
AA.NET_PRICE_FLG
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_AE_ALLOCATION AA 
INNER JOIN ( select BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE ,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
as BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH from $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH group by 1,2,3,4) NFM      
    --ON    (AA.FISCAL_MONTH_ID= NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
    ON    (AA.FISCAL_MONTH_ID= NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH)

   INNER JOIN(sel SUB_MEASURE_KEY,MEASURE_ID ,SUB_MEASURE_NAME from $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB where MEASURE_ID IN (1,2, 3, 4, 5, 6) group by 1, 2,3)  ASMP      
    ON    ( AA.SUB_MEASURE_KEY=ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_KEY       
    --AND    ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN (1,2, 3, 4, 5, 6)
     )
 
INNER JOIN(sel BK_PRODUCT_ID,ITEM_KEY from  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT group by 1,2) NP      
    ON    ( AA.PRODUCT_ID =NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)   

   INNER JOIN(select  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,TERRITORY_CODE,GLOBAL_NAME from  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY where GLOBAL_NAME='UO'  group by 1,2,3) EST
    ON    ( EST.TERRITORY_CODE =AA.SALES_TERRITORY_CODE      
    --AND    EST.GLOBAL_NAME='UO'
    ) 
/* Removed as part of ICPM Q3FY14 AE Upload*/
/*
INNER JOIN STGDB_Ts1.WI_EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY_IR EOUGC 
ON( EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE =AA.COMPANY_CODE 
AND EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =AA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID)*/
/* Added as part of ICPM Q3FY14 AE Upload*/
INNER JOIN(select BK_COMPANY_CODE ,END_TV_DATE from  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV where END_TV_DATE=16000101 group by 1,2)NFCTV 
    ON NFCTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE=AA.COMPANY_CODE  
    --AND NFCTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101

INNER JOIN ( SELECT     SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT FROM    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS GROUP BY 1 )NSOB
ON NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT=AA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
/* */
    INNER JOIN (select SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT, ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY from $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE group by 1,2) NECALU_BILL      
    ON    ( AA.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID= NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT) 

INNER JOIN (select SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT,ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY from  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE group by 1,2) NECALU_SHIP      
    ON    (AA.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID= NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT)

INNER JOIN (select CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY, SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT from $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT group by 1,2) NCAT       
    ON    ( NCAT.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = AA.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID)
WHERE AA.GROSS_UNBILLED_ACCRUED_REV_FLG <> 'Y'

SELECT
SMRCA.INDIRECT_ADJUSTMENT_KEY       
,NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE START_SSP_DT  
,'3500-01-01' END_SSP_DT                    
,'AE' SS_CD                         
,WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
,WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
,WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD         
,WIKEYS.BK_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WIKEYS.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY        
,WIKEYS.BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,WIKEYS.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
,WIKEYS.BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY  
,WIKEYS.BK_SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY  
,WIKEYS.BK_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY      
,WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
,WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
,WIKEYS.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT    
,WIKEYS.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD              
,WIKEYS.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT       
,WIKEYS.BK_PROJECT_CD                 
,WIKEYS.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD              
,WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD      
,WIKEYS.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,WIKEYS.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE       
,WIKEYS.REVENUE_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT    
,WIKEYS.COGS_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT       
,WIKEYS.DD_PROCESS_DT
,WIKEYS.BK_DEAL_ID
,WIKEYS.NET_PRICE_FLG
FROM $$STGDB.WI_INDRCT_REV_COGS_ALLOC_KEYS WIKEYS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
ON( WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_INDRCT_REV_COGS_ADJ_ALLOC SMRCA
ON (SMRCA.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT	=	WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND SMRCA.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   =	WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND SMRCA.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD		=	WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_PRODUCT_KEY                   =   WIKEYS.BK_PRODUCT_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =		WIKEYS.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_COMPANY_CD            =   WIKEYS.BK_COMPANY_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           =   WIKEYS.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY = WIKEYS.BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY  = WIKEYS.BK_SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY  = WIKEYS.BK_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT   = WIKEYS.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
AND SMRCA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT     = WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
AND SMRCA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    = WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD          =  WIKEYS.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD          =  WIKEYS.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT     =  WIKEYS.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
AND SMRCA.BK_PROJECT_CD             =  WIKEYS.BK_PROJECT_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   = WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD        =   WIKEYS.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE = WIKEYS.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE
AND SMRCA.BK_DEAL_ID = WIKEYS.BK_DEAL_ID
AND SMRCA.NET_PRICE_FLG = WIKEYS.NET_PRICE_FLG
)

SELECT
BATCH_ID                      
,ALLOCATION_TRANS_ID           
,FISCAL_MONTH_ID               
,SALES_TERRITORY_CODE          
,BUSINESS_ENTITY               
,PRODUCT_FAMILY                
,PRODUCT_ID                    
,BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,SUB_MEASURE_KEY               
,BEHAVIOR_ID                   
,ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE         
,ALLOCATION_AMOUNT             
,CREATE_USER                   
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,UPDATE_USER                   
,UPDATE_DATETIME               
,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,COMPANY_CODE          
,FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
,SUB_ACCOUNT_CD
,PROJECT_CD
,DEPARTMENT_CD
,FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD        
,BK_DEAL_ID
,GROSS_UNBILLED_ACCRUED_REV_FLG
,AA.NET_PRICE_FLG
,CREATE_TIMESTAMP              
,ACTION_CODE         
,'RI'  EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_AE_ALLOCATION AA
WHERE (NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	WHERE AA.FISCAL_MONTH_ID= NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP
	WHERE  AA.SUB_MEASURE_KEY=ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_KEY 
	AND  ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN (1,2, 3, 4, 5, 6)   )
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	WHERE AA.PRODUCT_ID =NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST
	WHERE EST.TERRITORY_CODE =AA.SALES_TERRITORY_CODE
	AND EST.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
/* Removed as Part of ICPM Q3 AE Uplaod*/
/*
	OR NOT EXISTS
    (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY_IR EOUGC 
          WHERE EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE =AA.COMPANY_CODE 
AND EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY =AA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID)*/
/* Added  as Part of ICPM Q3 AE Uplaod */
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFCTV 
	WHERE NFCTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101 AND NFCTV.BK_COMPANY_CODE=AA.COMPANY_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT  SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS  GROUP BY 1 )NSOB
	WHERE NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT=AA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID)
/* */
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	WHERE AA.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID= NECALU_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	WHERE AA.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID= NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT
	WHERE NCAT.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT  = AA.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID))

SELECT  RANK() OVER( ORDER BY      
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
,BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD         
,BK_PRODUCT_KEY                
,BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY        
,BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
,BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY  
,BK_SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY  
,BK_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY      
,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
,BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT    
,BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD              
,BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT       
,BK_PROJECT_CD                 
,BK_DEPARTMENT_CD              
,BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD      
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE 
,BK_DEAL_ID    
,NET_PRICE_FLG  
) +  CASE WHEN  SIRCAAKEY.MAX_VAL > NCVT.MAX_VAL   THEN SIRCAAKEY.MAX_VAL
	ELSE NCVT.MAX_VAL  END INDIRECT_ADJUSTMENT_KEY 
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT    
,BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD         
,BK_PRODUCT_KEY                
,BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY        
,BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
,BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY  
,BK_SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY  
,BK_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY      
,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
,BK_FINANCIAL_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
,BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT    
,BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD              
,BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT       
,BK_PROJECT_CD                 
,BK_DEPARTMENT_CD              
,BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD      
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE
,BK_DEAL_ID      
,NET_PRICE_FLG
FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(MAX_VAL),0) MAX_VAL FROM
     (
   SELECT COALESCE(MAX(INDIRECT_ADJUSTMENT_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_INDRCT_REV_COGS_ADJ_ALLOC   
  UNION ALL
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE    WHERE  REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ','DRCT_AS_T') /*knarlapu: DRCT_AS_T is included*/
  UNION ALL 
  SELECT COALESCE(MAX(REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE   WHERE REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ( 'IND_ADJ','DRCT_AS_T')/*knarlapu: DRCT_AS_T is included*/
   )SM_MAX) SIRCAAKEY,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(COGS_VARIANCE_TRANSACTION_KEY),0) MAX_VAL FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COGS_VARIANCE_TRANSACTION  NCVT) NCVT,
$$STGDB.WI_INDRCT_REV_COGS_ALLOC_KEYS  WIKEYS
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_INDRCT_REV_COGS_ADJ_ALLOC SMRCA
WHERE SMRCA.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
AND SMRCA.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   =	WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND SMRCA.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD	 =	WIKEYS.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD        =   WIKEYS.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_PRODUCT_KEY                   =   WIKEYS.BK_PRODUCT_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_COMPANY_CD            =   WIKEYS.BK_COMPANY_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           =   WIKEYS.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY         =  WIKEYS.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY = WIKEYS.BK_BILL_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY  = WIKEYS.BK_SHIP_TO_ERP_CUST_ACCT_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY  = WIKEYS.BK_SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
AND SMRCA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT   = WIKEYS.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
AND SMRCA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT     = WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
AND SMRCA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    = WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD          =  WIKEYS.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD          =  WIKEYS.BK_DEPARTMENT_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT     =  WIKEYS.BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
AND SMRCA.BK_PROJECT_CD             =  WIKEYS.BK_PROJECT_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   = WIKEYS.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD
AND SMRCA.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE = WIKEYS.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE
AND SMRCA.BK_DEAL_ID = WIKEYS.BK_DEAL_ID
AND SMRCA.NET_PRICE_FLG = WIKEYS.NET_PRICE_FLG
)

SELECT
 1 BATCH_ID                      
 ,-999 ALLOCATION_TRANS_ID           
 ,FISCAL_MONTH_ID               
 ,CASE WHEN SALES_TERRITORY_CODE = '-999'
      THEN  'UNKNOWN' 
ELSE SALES_TERRITORY_CODE  END           
 ,'UNKNOWN' BUSINESS_ENTITY               
 ,PRODUCT_FAMILY                
 ,PRODUCT_ID                    
 ,COALESCE(BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID, -999)          
 ,COALESCE(SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, -999)          
 ,COALESCE(SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID, -999)          
 ,SUB_MEASURE_KEY               
 ,'UNKNOWN' BEHAVIOR_ID                   
 ,1  ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE
 ,SUM ( ALLOCATION_AMOUNT) ALLOCATION_AMOUNT
 ,CREATE_USER                   
 ,CREATE_DATETIME               
 ,UPDATE_USER                   
 ,UPDATE_DATETIME               
 ,COALESCE(SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, -999)             
 ,COALESCE(COMPANY_CODE, 'UNK')
 ,COALESCE(FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,'UNKNO')
 ,COALESCE(SUB_ACCOUNT_CD,'UNK')
 ,COALESCE(PROJECT_CD,'UNKNOW')
 ,COALESCE(DEPARTMENT_CD,'UNKNOW')
 ,COALESCE(FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,'UNK')
 ,COALESCE(BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN')
 ,COALESCE(GROSS_UNBILLED_ACCRUED_REV_FLG,'N')
 ,COALESCE(NET_PRICE_FLG,'=')
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_TIMESTAMP              
 , 'I' ACTION_CODE                   
 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_AE_ALLOCATION
 GROUP BY 
 BATCH_ID   
 ,FISCAL_MONTH_ID               
 ,SALES_TERRITORY_CODE          
 ,PRODUCT_FAMILY                
 ,PRODUCT_ID                    
 ,BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
 ,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
 ,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
 ,SUB_MEASURE_KEY               
 ,CREATE_USER                   
 ,CREATE_DATETIME               
 ,UPDATE_USER                   
 ,UPDATE_DATETIME               
 ,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
 ,COMPANY_CODE
 ,FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD
 ,SUB_ACCOUNT_CD
 ,PROJECT_CD
 ,DEPARTMENT_CD
 ,FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD
 ,BK_DEAL_ID
 ,GROSS_UNBILLED_ACCRUED_REV_FLG
 ,NET_PRICE_FLG
 ,CREATE_TIMESTAMP              
 ,ACTION_CODE
